items.title: Aptos Foundation, Aptos Labs commit $50M to development as it eyes AI agent future
items.summary: The Aptos Foundation said building infrastructure that enables sub-second finality without the need for human intervention is a key to supporting the next wave of AI agent adoption.

items.title: Polygon reduces block time to 1.75 seconds as payments push accelerates
items.summary: Polygon delivered its first block time reduction upgrade since genesis, as the network seeks to position for more high-frequency applications such as private stablecoin payments.

items.title: Consensus panelists explain why Perp DEXes remain a tough sell for institutional investors
items.summary: Panelists at Consensus Miami said institutional investors are still largely absent from perp DEXs, citing security risks and KYC friction as key barriers.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: AI agents could solve crypto’s user problem
items.summary: Chappy Asel says autonomous software may be more natural users of wallets and stablecoins than humans, though agentic payments remain mostly theoretical.

items.title: Bitcoin slips to $79,000, DOGE leads majors losses as negative funding rates set 10-year record
items.summary: Bitcoin pulled back from this week's $81,500 high after U.S. forces fired on Iranian targets, while crypto futures markets logged their 67th straight day of negative funding rates, the longest streak in a decade per K33 Research.

items.title: AWS Northern Virginia data center overheats, impacting Coinbase
items.summary: Coinbase said on Friday its markets are being placed in “cancel only” mode but will begin to re-enable trading “shortly.”

items.title: Chaos Labs says oracles secure after attempted ‘nation-state’ wallet attack
items.summary: Chaos Labs said on Thursday it has rotated all keys since the attempted attack over the weekend and hasn't detected any suspicious activity since.

items.title: Coinbase shares slide on $400M Q1 loss, revenue miss
items.summary: Coinbase financial chief Alesia Haas said “macro conditions were genuinely tough,” while CEO Brian Armstrong highlighted a plan to diversify beyond spot trading.

items.title: Block Inc rises 8% as Q1 gives ‘earnings surprise’ despite Bitcoin dip
items.summary: Block’s Q1 earnings beat estimates despite Bitcoin revenue falling 26% on changing Bitcoin “trading dynamics” and reducing fees on Cash App transactions.

items.title: Coinbax wins $20,000 PitchFest prize at Consensus Miami for stablecoin compliance
items.summary: Coinbax took the top spot at Consensus Miami with software built to add compliance controls to onchain payments.

items.title: Privacy and accountability can coexist onchain, say panelists at Consensus Miami
items.summary: Public blockchains make transactions traceable, but that transparency can come at the expense of user privacy. Speakers from Moody’s Ratings and ChangeNOW said that hybrid blockchain architecture and address-level monitoring can help solve both problems simultaneously.

items.title: AI agents and large corporates will lead the next stablecoin boom, executives say
items.summary: Stablecoins are entering a new phase of adoption, with large corporations using them for cross-border treasury flows while AI agents begin using blockchain rails for autonomous payments, Bridge and Deus X Capital executives said at Consensus 2026.

items.title: Coinbase stock declines 5% after missing Q1 estimates on crypto slowdown
items.summary: The crypto platform missed on the top and bottom lines as falling digital asset prices weighed on trading activity and investor sentiment.

items.title: CZ floats Binance.US revival to give U.S. users access to global crypto liquidity
items.summary: The Binance founder said BNB Chain is the optimal payments rail for automated transactions between AI agents, noting that U.S. crypto policies are improving.

items.title: Tether executive warns the 2026 midterms could have 'seismic impact' on crypto industry
items.summary: Jesse Spiro, Head of Government Affairs at Tether, said at Consensus Miami 2026 that the midterms will be a key test for whether crypto’s recent policy gains in Washington can survive politically.

items.title: Bitmine to slow down ether purchases as it nears accumulation goal, Tom Lee says
items.summary: At the current pace of purchases, Lee said his Ethereum treasury giant would reach its 5% ether accumulation goal in six weeks, then shift its focus to staking and share buybacks.

items.title: 'DeFi is not dead,' it’s going mainstream with AI agents, crypto executives agree
items.summary: DeFi and its underlying technology have already proved themselves at scale, said eToro CEO Yoni Assia.

items.title: Donald Trump Jr. denies rumors World Liberty Financial is falling apart
items.summary: World Liberty Financial co-founder Donald Trump Jr. and co-founder and CEO Zach Witkoff pushed back on recent online rumors as the crypto firm battles Justin Sun in court.

items.title: Amazon’s new AI wallet: AWS, Coinbase, and Stripe build payment rails for bots
items.summary: Amazon said AI agents for now will be allowed to buy APIs, web content and other online services, but that future versions would enable hotel bookings, travel reservations and payments to merchants.
